summary: Tested Twilio WhatsApp webhook audit trail feature for WiseDrive CRM. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Leads page shows META_WHATSAPP and DIRECT_WHATSAPP sources correctly, Lead Investigator modal opens and has search functionality.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint may not exist or has different path

critical_code_review_comments: Webhook correctly stores comprehensive audit trail with raw_twilio_params, parsed_standard_fields, parsed_ctwa_fields, extraction_log, city_lookup_log, and final_assignment
META_WHATSAPP vs DIRECT_WHATSAPP source classification works correctly based on presence of CTWA data
Lead Investigate API (/api/leads/investigate/by-phone/{phone}) returns webhook_audit data correctly
CtwaClid is correctly extracted and stored as ad_id when present
City lookup uses 4 strategies: ad_id match, ad_name match, body content match, and keyword extraction from ad_name

success_rate.frontend: 100% - UI loads correctly, sources displayed properly

seed_data_creation: Test leads created via webhook: +919876543210 (META_WHATSAPP with CTWA data), +919876543211 (DIRECT_WHATSAPP)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Twilio WhatsApp webhook audit trail feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/webhooks/twilio/whatsapp (accepts CTWA params, stores audit trail), GET /api/leads/investigate/by-phone/{phone} (returns webhook_audit data). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_twilio_webhook_audit_trail.py can be reused for regression testing.

features_tested.POST /api/webhooks/twilio/whatsapp: PASS - Accepts all CTWA parameters (CtwaClid, ReferralHeadline, ReferralSourceUrl, etc.) and stores audit trail
features_tested.GET /api/leads/investigate/by-phone/{pho: PASS - Returns full lead data including webhook_audit with all sections
features_tested.META_WHATSAPP source classification: PASS - Leads with CTWA data (CtwaClid or ReferralHeadline) are classified as META_WHATSAPP
features_tested.DIRECT_WHATSAPP source classification: PASS - Leads without CTWA data are classified as DIRECT_WHATSAPP
features_tested.Audit trail sections: PASS - All 6 sections present: raw_twilio_params, parsed_standard_fields, parsed_ctwa_fields, extraction_log, city_lookup_log, final_assignment
features_tested.Frontend Leads page: PASS - Shows leads with correct source (META_WHATSAPP/DIRECT_WHATSAPP) and AD IDs
features_tested.Lead Investigator modal: PASS - Opens correctly with Search by Phone and Search by Name tabs

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: NameError in webhook - missing To, AccountSid, NumMedia parameters
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added To, AccountSid, NumMedia as Form parameters with defaults
bug_fix_verification.verification: PASS - Webhook now accepts all parameters without errors and stores audit trail correctly
